title: schoenus kennyi
intro: Schoenus kennyi, also known as the Swamp-rush, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family, Cyperaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Schoenus kennyi include alleviating congestion, reducing fever, and soothing sore throats. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can also be used in poultices to apply topically to affected areas.
